description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3 Docker image for all jobs and runs a shared before_script that installs base requirements with pip install -r .ci/requirements.txt, generates a temporary requirements file via python setup.py requirements and installs it, then installs module requirements with pip install -r .ci/requirements_modules.txt. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build:3 job that runs ./tools/local_install.sh --local-modules ~/bin. In the test stage add a lint:3 job (allow_failure) that runs ./tools/weboob_lint.sh, a pyflakes:3 job that runs ./tools/pyflakes.sh, an unittests-modules:3 job (allow_failure) that runs ./tools/run_tests.sh --no-core, and an unittests:3 job that runs ./tools/run_tests.sh --no-modules. In the deploy stage add a doc:3 job that changes directory to ./docs and runs make html.
